name: IDFC FIRST WOW Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Lifetime free credit card with no joining, annual, or renewal fees

categoryRates.description: 1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on all purchases
5X Reward Points on select rotating categories chosen via IDFC FIRST app

cappedCategories.description: 5X rewards on select categories capped at 3,000 bonus RP per month

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free with absolutely zero fees
5X rewards on select categories via IDFC FIRST app
Zero interest on ATM cash withdrawals for up to 48 days
Instant card issuance for IDFC FIRST Bank account holders
pros: Lifetime free with zero joining, annual, and renewal fees
5X rewards on select categories add value on targeted spends
Zero interest ATM withdrawal is a unique IDFC FIRST benefit
Low income requirement of ₹2.5 LPA makes it accessible
cons: Low base earn rate of 1 RP per ₹100 (0.25% return)
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking for a zero-cost card
IDFC FIRST Bank account holders wanting a free credit card
Users who want basic rewards without paying any fees

faqs.question: Is the IDFC FIRST WOW card truly lifetime free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the IDFC FIRST WOW card has zero joining fee, zero annual fee, and zero renewal fee for life. There are no hidden charges or spend-based conditions for fee waiver.

faqs.question: How do the 5X select categories work?
faqs.answer: Through the IDFC FIRST Bank app, you can select specific spending categories that earn 5X reward points. These categories may rotate periodically, and you can update your selections via the app.

faqs.question: Can I get this card without an IDFC FIRST Bank account?
faqs.answer: While you can apply without an existing account, having an IDFC FIRST Bank savings account significantly improves approval chances and may enable instant card issuance.

faqs.question: How does this compare to other lifetime free cards?
faqs.answer: The WOW card is competitive among lifetime free cards with its 5X select category rewards and never-expiring points. However, it lacks lounge access and welcome benefits that some other free cards like the AU LIT offer.
